pilot.description: Paper revision pilot: verify data consistency and section coherence

tasks.name: Pilot: Verify key statistics against source files
tasks.description: Quick check of 5 key statistics from paper against exp/results/full/ JSON files. Sample: H7 trained mean (expected 0.034), H7 random mean (expected 0.278), H1b layer 8 r (expected -0.431), H5 precision (expected 1.0), H6 precision@20 (expected 0.0).

pilot.pass_criteria: At least 4/5 statistics match source files within tolerance

tasks.name: Pilot: Check section coherence
tasks.description: Quick review of abstract-intro-methodology flow. Verify abstract promises are fulfilled in later sections. Check for terminology consistency across sections.
